name: should complete email verification flow with wallet adapter

steps.name: Navigate to Solana Next.js 15 Turbopack app home page
Handle WebKit redirect email verification flow
Submit email form and intercept API call
Wait for verification code and retrieve from API
Verify wallet adapter connected state
